nasb.text: You shall describe the land in seven divisions, and bring the description here to me. I will cast lots for you here before the Lord our God.

esv.text: And you shall describe the land in seven divisions and bring the description here to me. And I will cast lots for you here before the Lord our God.

cnv.text: 你們要把地劃分七份，然後把圖樣拿給我；我要在這裡，在耶和華我們的　神面前，為你們抽籤。

ccb.text: 你们把这七份土地绘成地图交给我，我要在我们的上帝耶和华面前为你们抽签。
